targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmh-benchmarks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmh_benchmark")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.suite == "SingleThread")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.branch =~ /${branch}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "score")
  |> group(columns: ["query"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "jmh-benchmarks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmh_benchmark")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.suite == "MultiThread")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.branch =~ /${branch}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "score")
  |> group(columns: ["query"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Scalability: MT/ST Throughput Ratio
panels.description: How well each query parallelizes across 8 CCX33 cores. Ratio > 1 means MT is faster than ST.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmh-benchmarks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "scalability")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.branch =~ /${branch}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ratio")
  |> group(columns: ["query"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Latest vs Previous Run (Single-Thread)
panels.description: Delta table comparing the last two runs

targets.query:
latest = from(bucket: "jmh-benchmarks")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmh_benchmark")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.suite == "SingleThread")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.branch =~ /${branch}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "score")
  |> group(columns: ["query"])
  |> last()
  |> set(key: "run", value: "latest")

previous = from(bucket: "jmh-benchmarks")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmh_benchmark")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.suite == "SingleThread")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.branch =~ /${branch}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "score")
  |> group(columns: ["query"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 2)
  |> first()
  |> set(key: "run", value: "previous")

union(tables: [latest, previous])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["query"], columnKey: ["run"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      query: r.query,
      latest: r.latest,
      previous: r.previous,
      delta_pct: if r.previous > 0.0 then (r.latest - r.previous) / r.previous * 100.0 else 0.0
  }))

panels.title: Latest vs Previous Run (Multi-Thread)
panels.description: Delta table comparing the last two runs

targets.query:
latest = from(bucket: "jmh-benchmarks")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmh_benchmark")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.suite == "MultiThread")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.branch =~ /${branch}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "score")
  |> group(columns: ["query"])
  |> last()
  |> set(key: "run", value: "latest")

previous = from(bucket: "jmh-benchmarks")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmh_benchmark")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.suite == "MultiThread")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.branch =~ /${branch}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "score")
  |> group(columns: ["query"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 2)
  |> first()
  |> set(key: "run", value: "previous")

union(tables: [latest, previous])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["query"], columnKey: ["run"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      query: r.query,
      latest: r.latest,
      previous: r.previous,
      delta_pct: if r.previous > 0.0 then (r.latest - r.previous) / r.previous * 100.0 else 0.0
  }))

panels.title: Per-Query Detail: ${query}
panels.description: Score with error band for the selected query

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmh-benchmarks")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmh_benchmark")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.query == "${query}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.suite =~ /${suite}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.branch =~ /${branch}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "score" or r._field == "score_error")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _value: r.score,
      score_low: r.score - r.score_error,
      score_high: r.score + r.score_error
  }))
